phase_description: EnsembleTX, the pilot phase of Project Ensemble, launched on 13 November 2025 and is operating throughout 2026. Initial focus: tokenised money market fund transactions and real-time liquidity / treasury management. Interbank settlement is initially facilitated via the HKD Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system, with progressive upgrades planned to support 24/7 settlement in tokenised central bank money.

themes.title: Fixed Income & Investment Funds
themes.description: Tokenised bond and investment fund settlement, including tokenised money market fund transactions in the EnsembleTX pilot phase. SFC co-leads tokenisation initiatives for the asset management industry under this theme.

themes.title: Liquidity Management
themes.description: Real-time interbank liquidity and treasury management using tokenised deposits, including intraday liquidity optimisation.

themes.title: Green & Sustainable Finance
themes.description: Tokenisation of green and sustainability-linked financial instruments.

themes.title: Trade & Supply Chain Finance
themes.description: Application of tokenisation to trade and supply chain finance instruments.

milestones.title: HKMA announces Project Ensemble
milestones.description: HKMA announces the commencement of Project Ensemble, a new wholesale central bank digital currency (wCBDC) project to support development of the Hong Kong tokenisation market. Initial focus on tokenised deposits and exploration of innovative FMI for interbank settlement of tokenised money. Builds on prior tokenised deposit experimentation conducted with HSBC, Hang Seng Bank and Ant Group in 2023.

sources.title: HKMA Press Release: HKMA unveils Project Ensemble to support the development of the Hong Kong tokenisation market

milestones.title: Project Ensemble Architecture Community formed
milestones.description: HKMA forms the Project Ensemble Architecture Community, a multi-stakeholder group of banks, technology companies, regulators (including the SFC), and academics. Aim: develop industry standards to support interoperability among wCBDC, tokenised money and tokenised assets.

sources.title: HKMA — Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) page

milestones.title: HKMA and Banque de France MOU on wCBDC and tokenisation
milestones.description: HKMA and Banque de France (BdF) sign Memorandum of Understanding to promote innovation in wholesale CBDC and tokenisation. Includes connection between Ensemble Sandbox and BdF's Distributed Ledger for Securities Settlement System (DL3S), demonstrating atomic cross-border settlement.

sources.title: Norton Rose Fulbright — HKMA launches Project Ensemble Sandbox

milestones.title: Project Ensemble Sandbox launches
milestones.description: HKMA launches the Project Ensemble Sandbox at a public ceremony with the SFC. Sandbox is designed as a new financial market infrastructure facilitating the full lifecycle of tokenised asset transactions — creation, trading, payment using tokenised commercial-bank deposits, and final interbank settlement using wCBDC. Four initial themes announced: fixed income & investment funds, liquidity management, green & sustainable finance, trade & supply chain finance.

sources.title: HKMA Press Release: HKMA launches Project Ensemble Sandbox to accelerate adoption of tokenisation
Hong Kong Government Information Services announcement

milestones.title: EnsembleTX pilot phase launches
milestones.description: HKMA announces the launch of EnsembleTX, the pilot phase of Project Ensemble. EnsembleTX moves from sandbox proof-of-concept to real-value transactions in tokenised deposits and digital assets. Initial focus: tokenised money market fund transactions and real-time liquidity / treasury management. Interbank settlement initially via HKD Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system, with progressive upgrades to support 24/7 settlement in tokenised central bank money. Pilot operates throughout 2026.

sources.title: HKMA Press Release: HKMA announces the new phase of Project Ensemble to support real-value transactions in tokenised deposits and digital assets
The Block: Hong Kong launches tokenized deposit pilot with real-value transactions

use_cases.title: Tokenised Money Market Fund Transactions
use_cases.description: EnsembleTX pilot's primary launch use case: settlement of tokenised money market fund transactions using tokenised deposits. Enables faster and more transparent fund subscription and redemption flows.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Annex B of the November 2025 HKMA announcement lists asset managers including BlackRock and Franklin Templeton as industry pioneers in this use case. Specific transaction volumes and counterparties are not publicly disclosed.

use_cases.title: Real-Time Liquidity & Treasury Management
use_cases.description: Use of tokenised deposits to manage interbank liquidity and treasury needs in real time. Initial settlement supported by HKD RTGS, with progressive upgrade path to 24/7 tokenised central bank money settlement.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Participating banks listed in Annex A of the November 2025 announcement.

use_cases.title: Sandbox: Fixed Income & Investment Funds (Bond Tokenisation)
use_cases.description: Sandbox theme covering bond tokenisation and investment fund tokenisation. SFC co-led tokenisation initiatives for the asset management industry under this theme. Specific use case experiments and outcomes are not publicly itemised.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Specific participating institutions per use case experiment were not publicly enumerated by HKMA.

sources.title: Norton Rose Fulbright — HKMA launches Project Ensemble Sandbox

use_cases.title: Sandbox: Liquidity Management
use_cases.description: Sandbox theme covering interbank liquidity management use cases using tokenised deposits and wCBDC. Specific participating banks tested payment-versus-payment and delivery-versus-payment settlement.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Specific participating institutions per use case experiment were not publicly enumerated by HKMA.

use_cases.title: Sandbox: Green & Sustainable Finance
use_cases.description: Sandbox theme covering tokenisation of green and sustainability-linked financial instruments.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Specific participating institutions per use case experiment were not publicly enumerated by HKMA.

use_cases.title: Sandbox: Trade & Supply Chain Finance
use_cases.description: Sandbox theme covering tokenisation in trade and supply chain finance instruments.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: Specific participating institutions per use case experiment were not publicly enumerated by HKMA.

use_cases.title: Cross-Border Atomic Settlement (HKMA × Banque de France)
use_cases.description: Connection between Ensemble Sandbox and Banque de France's Distributed Ledger for Securities Settlement System (DL3S). Pilots demonstrated atomic cross-border settlement through the linked systems.
use_cases.participating_institutions_disclosed: HKMA and Banque de France as institutional counterparties.

sources.title: Norton Rose Fulbright — HKMA launches Project Ensemble Sandbox

institutions.name: Hong Kong Monetary Authority
institutions.role: Project lead. Operates the wCBDC infrastructure, coordinates the Architecture Community, and oversees the EnsembleTX pilot.

publicReferences.title: Project Ensemble — Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) page

institutions.name: Securities and Futures Commission
institutions.role: Co-leads tokenisation initiatives for the asset management industry under the fixed income & investment funds theme. Member of the Architecture Community.

institutions.name: Banque de France
institutions.role: Cross-border counterparty. Connected its Distributed Ledger for Securities Settlement System (DL3S) to the Ensemble Sandbox to demonstrate atomic cross-border settlement.

publicReferences.title: HKMA / BdF MOU on wCBDC and tokenisation (June 2024)

institutions.name: HSBC
institutions.role: Participated in 2023 tokenised deposit experimentation that informed Project Ensemble. Listed as a participating bank (Annex A) in the EnsembleTX pilot announcement of November 2025.

institutions.name: Hang Seng Bank
institutions.role: Participated in 2023 tokenised deposit experimentation with HKMA that informed Project Ensemble.

institutions.name: Ant Group
institutions.role: Participated in 2023 tokenised deposit experimentation with HKMA that informed Project Ensemble.

institutions.name: Standard Chartered Bank (Hong Kong)
institutions.role: Listed as a participating bank in the EnsembleTX pilot announcement of November 2025.

institutions.name: Bank of China (Hong Kong)
institutions.role: Listed as a participating bank in the EnsembleTX pilot announcement of November 2025.

institutions.name: BlackRock
institutions.role: Listed in Annex B as an industry pioneer participant in the EnsembleTX pilot announcement of November 2025. Participation context relates to tokenised money market fund transactions.

institutions.name: Franklin Templeton
institutions.role: Listed in Annex B as an industry pioneer participant in the EnsembleTX pilot announcement of November 2025. Participation context relates to tokenised money market fund transactions.
